title: City of El Cajon: Photographs of Graffiti Uploaded to "Requests and Issues" section of city website

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All photographs of graffiti uploaded to the city of El Cajon's website (elcajon.gov). These photographs would have been uploaded via this form: https://www.elcajon.gov/i-want-to/report/requests-and-issues

This is just a request for the images uploaded, not for the identifying information in the form itself. 

Time frame for request: January 1st 2021 to March 1st 2026. 

Please provide any reasonable segregable portion of a requested record after removing or redacting those portions claimed to be exempt, explain in writing the justification for redacting the record, indicate the extent of any redactions on the portion of the record which is made available or published and where technically feasible indicate on the redacted portion itself the specific exemption(s) claimed. There is a public interest in seeing what has been flagged as graffiti by the public to the city of El Cajon. 

Thank you to the city of El Cajon's commitment to transparency.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Robert Delaware
